name: @agile-team/wl-skills-bd
description: 面向 Java 8、Spring Boot 2、jh4j-cloud 3 的后端工程规范、生产安全契约、代码生成、质量门、MCP 与数据治理闭环（v0.17.2）
author: agile-team

scripts.test: node tests/be-rules.test.js && node tests/governance-policy.test.js && node tests/reporters.test.js && node tests/template-engine.test.js && node tests/contract.test.js && node tests/template-contract.test.js && node tests/collaboration.test.js && node tests/installer.test.js && node tests/codegen.test.js && node tests/codegen-production-guard.test.js && node tests/database-safety.test.js && node tests/safe-fix.test.js && node tests/write-chain-safety.test.js && node tests/java-compile-fixture.test.js && node tests/project-catalog.test.js && node tests/commit-policy.test.js && node tests/cli.test.js && node tests/verify-version.test.js && node tests/mcp-registry.test.js && node tests/mcp-server.test.js && node tests/contract-extensions.test.js && node tests/config-layering.test.js && node tests/task-router.test.js && node tests/test-codegen.test.js
scripts.verify: npm run version:verify && npm run lint:skills && npm run lint:js && npm run verify:quality-config && npm run test
scripts.release:check: npm run verify && npm run verify:quality-maven && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts
